name: wrench-plugins
description: Wrench.ai's official Claude Code plugin marketplace — B2B intelligence, revenue operations, and engineering quality skills

plugins.name: wrench-charts
plugins.description: Brand-compliant Recharts chart components — chart type guide, color tokens, tooltip patterns, mobile responsiveness

plugins.name: feature-spec
plugins.description: Write complete feature specs with acceptance criteria, task breakdown, and Cypress test plan — nothing ships without all three

plugins.name: bug-audit
plugins.description: Structured bug audit covering functional correctness, UX quality, test coverage gaps, and customer-surfaced classification

plugins.name: wrench-de-review
plugins.description: Data engineering PR review — idempotency, dedup, cardinality assertions, schema contracts, error handling

plugins.name: wrench-ux-constitution
plugins.description: UX governance — 11 design principles, Six Pillars initiative, Seven Empirical Gaps, and pre-ship checklist

plugins.name: wrench-outreach
plugins.description: Write B2B outreach sequences (email + LinkedIn) — multi-step, persona-specific, direct voice

plugins.name: meeting-dossier
plugins.description: Pre-meeting intelligence brief from Wrench.ai enrichment data — lead score, personas, talking points, draft messages

plugins.name: dossier-builder
plugins.description: Contact intelligence dossier builder — pulls Wrench.ai signals and outputs a scannable HTML artifact

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Remove AI writing patterns — strips corporate filler, hedging, and statistical-middle language from any text

plugins.name: seo-audit
plugins.description: Comprehensive SEO audit — technical, on-page, Core Web Vitals, indexing, and structured data

plugins.name: page-cro
plugins.description: Conversion rate optimization for marketing pages — hero, CTA, social proof, and above-the-fold analysis

plugins.name: wrench-personalize
plugins.description: Persona-based B2B personalization — identify the dominant archetype, select meta-measures that activate it, build positioning, and produce ready-to-deploy message variants. Works standalone, scales with Wrench.ai.

plugins.name: wrench-dossier
plugins.description: Contact intelligence brief plus voice-adaptive ghostwriter output. Scannable pre-meeting brief with ready-to-send messages adapted to the contact's behavioral profile and your tone. Standalone or Wrench.ai-powered.

plugins.name: wrench-report
plugins.description: Sales intelligence reports in three modes: Competitive 360 (competitor positioning + battle cards), Brand Insights (persona resonance analysis), or Lead Scoring CRM Report (ranked pipeline with next actions). HTML artifact output.

plugins.name: wrench-scorecard
plugins.description: Score and rank any contact list using the Wrench.ai methodology — tiered prioritization, scoring rationale per contact, data gap flags. Works standalone; scales with live 183-variable model when Wrench.ai is connected.

plugins.name: wrench-enrichment
plugins.description: Contact and company enrichment workflow — firmographic classification, behavioral signal inference, archetype mapping, and data gap analysis. Works standalone; scales with live API enrichment when Wrench.ai is connected.

plugins.name: wrench-campaign
plugins.description: B2B campaign brief builder — audience profiling, channel selection, message framework, sequence structure, and benchmarks. Works standalone; scales with live persona distributions and competitor intelligence when Wrench.ai is connected.

plugins.name: wrench-personas
plugins.description: Population-level persona engine — cluster any contact list into segments, place each on the technology adoption curve, build OCEAN personality fingerprints, surface SHAP-weighted meta-measure priorities, and produce message recipes per cluster. Standalone methodology; ML-clustered + patented hypertargeting when Wrench.ai is connected.
